completeTask(uint256).notice: Requester or coordinator completes task; revokes permission and refunds unspent budget.

createTask(string,uint256).notice: User creates a task; budget is escrowed in GuildPermissions (ERC-7710).

hireAgent(uint256,address).notice: Coordinator hires an agent; pays via ERC-7710 usePermission (x402).
